reviews.review_description:
I'm about a month into having my Quest 3. I checked out a few games off the hop including this one. I was amazed at the visuals and liked the pace, but was more interested in playing some sports games. 

I came back to this game in the past few days and now I can't put it down! It's perfectly paced and you have the option as you play to make it more about speed in completing the game, or take your time to find all the items as you go. The puzzles range from easy to quite tricky, and I only cheated once or twice by watching a video to complete a challenge. 

Highly recommend this one if you like puzzle games. (They even let you skip though the bigger fight scenes if that's not something you're into.) 🙂

Hi I’ve played this game 3 times and have 3 hours on it now and the visuals are amazing and the overall game is so entertaining! I was unsure about getting the game at first so I bought it anyway and I DO NOT regret buying it. Highly recommended by me! 5 stars!

Moss is a truly charming VR experience from start to finish.

The visuals are beautiful, with environments that feel like living storybook dioramas. Quill’s animations are outstanding and give her an incredible amount of personality despite having no spoken dialogue. The gameplay is intuitive, blending puzzles, combat, and exploration in a way that feels natural and engaging.

The world is rich with detail, the story is heartwarming and immersive, and the challenges strike a great balance between accessibility and satisfaction. The soundtrack perfectly complements the adventure, adding emotion, wonder, and atmosphere to every moment.

Moss is a polished, magical, and memorable game that showcases the unique strengths of virtual reality. Easily one of the most delightful VR adventures I’ve played.

This game is a visual treat...and then its just frustrating. If you get stuck on an obstacle, there is no help and no way to move past it, so that's it for the game. I've had the game for over a year, and have come back a few times to try to pass a particular obstacle. As I've been unsuccessful, there it sits. Huge bummer.

Moss is one of the most unique and incredible VR puzzle adventure experiences ever. It's an artfully crafted fairytale that everyone will enjoy. I highly recommend playing if you are a puzzle adventure fan like me. Also, if you haven't played Moss: Book II I recommend that you do. You will be as equally impressed.

I have to say, this is one of the best games I have played on VR. I'm quite new to the Quest, but I tried this game out and it instantly blew my mind. I spent the first 5 minutes of playing just saying "wow" to myself out loud. Who would have thought platformers would work in VR, turns out when done like this, platformers are perfect for VR!

Everything works so well. The story, the platforming, the combat, the interaction...
This game is so atmospheric, with such likable characters, how you can control Quill and also help her out by grabbing things, and even give her a high-5!
There are puzzles and sometimes they might stump you, but try to think outside the box, stick with it and none of the puzzles are ever overly tough. If you do get too stumped though, there are various walkthroughs on YouTube.
The combat is simple but it just works. Especially as you can contribute further by grabbing the enemies and getting them to attack each other...and restore Quill's health by pulling her backpack up.
It's a sizable game too! Spanning lots of biomes and gorgeously detailed and rendered areas! Make sure you look around everywhere!
The voice acting is incredible! The narration and character voices are all done by the same voice actress and she does such an amazing job at it to sound like it's different people whilst also sounding like someone is reading you an actual story!

Check this game out! I was so impressed straight away that I had to buy the 2nd game immediately! Devs, please keep making more Moss games! This is how it should be done!
And the ending of this game! Such a finale!

You guys also need to make an animated film of this game! That would be proper successful!

All hands down. That's a pretty interesting game. The atmosphere the adventure of it is really the good part about it. I enjoy it. I'll give it five stars all the way to the top if I can get more stars
One of my first VR games. Loved the concept and execution. Play if you can

I really love this game.  Its visually appealing and takes me away, just what I needed.  However you still need use your brain to figure out some challenges.  Had to lookup  online a couple times but worth it.  I got stuck a bit on one level or two for longer than wanted to but just kept trying until reached the end.
I have played moss and moss 2 3 times never get sick of it  i love these games so much extra that moss is so cute, cant wait for developer brings moss 3 out, please don't keep us waiting g
The animations are so slow I keep dying and the boss just won't die I keep trying it's just stupid
For me it was a very calming game. I played without stress. Its landscapes made very cozy environment
I've just played for a bit, but the game has been incredible in all aspects, will update the review later if needed. But this seems like one of the best VR games.

I loved this game! Visually stimulating, stunning engagements, and great story. Unfortunately, I can not give this 5 star due to lack of replay value. The easily solved puzzles and predictably would make me pass on the second play. Hats off to the developers though.

I got a VR headset to work out from home. I never thought I would get into any of the games or apps. Moss changed my mind, and now after finishing book one and two, I'm trying to find something to fill the void. It's a very beautiful game, and if you don't normally play things like this it really makes you think! Please hurry up with book 3!

I was enjoying this until it glitched out at the eye of death or whatever you want to call it. I watched couple walkthroughs. It should have been as simple as flipping a switch but the switch was stuck. Uninstalled and deleted. Thank God i didn't buy the sequel yet. Too bad. The game showed potential.

As a cat person and someone who normally doesn’t play RPG-style games, I was hesitant at first. But after seeing so many great reviews from people who also don’t usually play this genre, I decided to give it a chance and I’m so glad I did!

This game is incredibly well-made and beautifully immersive. I wasn’t expecting the unique perspective it gives you in VR, and it completely drew me in. The pacing is perfect  Not overwhelming or overloaded with tasks like some RPGs can be. Just enough to keep me engaged and motivated.

The graphics are stunning, honestly some of the best I’ve seen in VR so far. I love that you can interact with the environment, which makes everything feel even more alive. And Quill is absolutely adorable 🥺❤️🐭 

This experience truly exceeded my expectations. After finishing Book 1, I immediately got Book 2 because I wasn’t ready for it to end. I really hope they release a Book 3 or something similar in the future. If you’re debating whether to get the bundle, I’d say just go for it it’s absolutely worth it. I know there’s Glassbreakers, but that’s not quite the same type of experience I’m looking for.

Reached out to Polyark and they say yes it's broken and they can't fix it anytime soon, it's been months.
Reply from them:
"I have notified our engineers of this issue, but I cannot promise any kind of timeframe wherein we can complete this investigation.

At the moment, we can only ask for your patience as we try to find a way to get you back to playing."

reviews.review_title: So much fun. I couldn't stop playing!
reviews.review_description: This game is a lot of fun and adorable at the same time. I finished the game over 2 days . As someone who is new to VR this was an amazing first game to play. I fear nothing else will compare. Look forward to the next one.

I bought Quest 3 mainly for the sport games. I've never been interested in games like that. But this game is wonderful, visually beautiful, with interesting puzzles that aren't too difficult. I'm transported to a beautiful world, meticulously crafted down to the last detail. I never thought I'd love a game so much. And I'm 42!
I liked the story and the graphics, I would say unique in vr gaming. Got me really interested to continue with the second book.

First time on VR and I decided to get Moss because everyone has been talking about it! I got Moss when it was on sale and loved the whole storyline, everything was all cute and cozy, it took me about 4 hours to finish split between 2 days and it was very enjoyable! I also spent another 2 hours getting all the Fragment scrolls and Relic dust just because I wanted to go through everything again. Downloading Moss II as I'm typing this out because this one was so fun!! Recommended if you like super duper cute stuff, Quill is the best!!
Great story, excellent visuals

Ah this game is fantastic. Puzzle based platform that makes you feel for the little mouse Quill. Beautiful atmosphere surrounding the vr experience. But be warned, never miss a high five. You'll feel like you've let her down. 5 stars only because they dont ask for more
I wanted to love this game, but I can’t get the controllers to do what they are supposed to do. I’m frustrated and think I’ll give it up before I break something.

This is a great introduction to VR gaming! It's very comfortable to play. It has great puzzle & platformer gameplay, it has a great soundtrack, and a decent story too.  What more could a person ask for? I also liked that the puzzles add to the gameplay but weren't too hard.  It's very relaxing to just sit down and enjoy this game.

One of my favorite VR games to date. Took me bout 4 hours to beat, 5 hours to reach 100% completion). Some replay value would have been great outside of achievements but as-is it's still amazing and I will be going on to Moss 2 ASAP. Thanks for a great experience!

This game is absolutely fantastic! The unique perspective and background environments are beautiful, graphics are beautiful and Quill is so cute!! She communicates with you throughout the game and you can high five her and pat her it’s just adorable! I grew attached to her haha. This has got to be the most enjoyable vr game I have played so far and I have played many! And that snake at the end is kind of creepy XD Gameplay is fun and rewarding!
Just play it you WILL NOT REGRET IT it’s so awesome can’t wait for book 2 and more !!!!!

I bought this game for $30.00 about a year ago for the quest 1 and it played really good . And now it don't play at all. No picture black screen. You can  hear it play but no picture . I think it's because when they updated it for the quest 3 and the 3S it messed up the quest 1. They need to have the old download for moss for the quest 1 so they can download it back or give a refund . I'd like to have it back. Because it was a good game or give me a refund

Moss is one of the most beautiful VR games I’ve ever played. Quill is absolutely precious, and the world feels like a living fairytale. But I’m giving it 3 stars because the constant genre-mixing is just exhausting.
One moment I’m peacefully solving a puzzle, and the next — I have to run for my life because that snake is trying to eat me! It’s so frustrating. In my opinion, you can’t mix genres like this. It should be either a platformer or a puzzle game. You can't catch all types of players at once: the "thinkers" get annoyed by the jumping, and the "jumpers" get bored with the thinking.
The forced rush and those "run-on-time" moments really killed the vibe for me. I want to enjoy the beauty, not stress out over timers. A great game, but that snake can really ruin your mood!

I love it. I am  not a gamer but this game is beautiful on the quest 3s. It relaxing and I sit on my bed just playing it. It not hard to figure out and I have to redo many times bc my character the mouse died. But I love it I feel like I’m in the game with her. So cute when I pet her she glows
I absolutely love this game. I felt connected to my character which brings emotions into play. The world is gorgeous. I can't recommend it highly enough!

The game is just amazing. I can't explain enough. I literally cried so many times. The story is amazing. The characters are good. The atmosphere and the places are grand. The music amazing. Just amazing game 10/10 game.

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed oppurtunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I dont see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I recieved a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.

I didn’t expect much from this game. I played Trover Saves the Universe and was a fan of the platformer genre for VR. 

I was immediately swept away to this world you built. The visuals are stunning and the puzzles challenging but not annoying. I was pleasantly surprised by the relationship you grow with the main character Quill. You guys NAILED IT. I can’t wait to turn the page to part two.
The best gaming experience on every level! Breathtaking visual immersion. Amazing storyline. A true masterpiece for all ages! You will race to buy the second and pray for a third.

I agree with all the reviews that say that this is a very beautiful game, it’s immersive and fun to play. I also agree with a few people that say now that they bought it, they can’t play it because all that shows up is the title screen or black. I have uninstalled and reinstalled the game several times and I cannot get it to fire up as it should, I don’t expect a refund because I bought it years ago when the oculus first came out. I had set my headset away for a while got it out. Wanted to play it again and nothing. The problem is I can’t buy it cause I already own it and I can’t even give it to myself as a gift. I don’t mind buying it again because that’s how much I would like to continue to play it but as of yet I have not figured out a way to do that.

This is the first real game I have found on VR that meets and exceeds my expectations of what this console can do. Moss is a beautiful game with beautiful animations, attention to detail in the foreground and background, and a super adorable main character who uses asl to communicate with the player!
The puzzles and fights were not too hard or too easy, and its perfect for gamers of any skill level.
This is just the best game ever. Both my wife and I have enjoyed it thoroughly. Thank you so much. Please make more lovely stories!

This game brought me joy and happiness. The story grew increasingly personal and drew me in the more I played. I found myself talking to my little buddy Quill as she really made me proud. Favorite game ever.
Amazing 1st RPG Game. Graphics and story are wonderful. Really enjoyed. The use of sign throughout here and there was nice to see.

After a few months where I've played Golf+ almost exclusively, and all the mixture of emotions that an accurate simulation of golf can bring, I sat down to play Moss. From beginning to end it had me smiling, and bonding with a computer game character more than I have in a long time. Lovely little piece of storytelling.

reviews.review_title: The cutest game I have ever played
reviews.review_description: Long story short, it is awesome, even for a grown-up man. My kids and I enjoyed the story, puzzles, and especially the graphics. I love it when you successfully solve a harder puzzle, the mouse gives you a high five. I also bought Moss 2, but haven't played it yet.

Moss & Moss II are so much fun. I’m not much of a gamer but this series had me excited to get on and play. I had a blast and hope a 3 comes out soon! Start your Moss adventure now, you won’t regret it!

Moss & Moss 2 are phenomenal. The total immersion into another world, the story, the graphics, the puzzles to solve and the intricate way to navigate is amazing. I will be massively disappointed if they don’t continue with Book 3
Amazing game. Love the graphics and how we interact with the game. Will play the second one soon!
I have no words for this bro..just i say is..heartfelt,mild violence and best story..I just bought the moss book II cant wait to play!
There’s a reason the scores are so high. It’s an incredible game, scalable on levels of difficulty. If you want to sense some wonder in your day, buy Moss.

reviews.review_title: Probably one of my most favorite games!
reviews.review_description: This is in my top 5 games of all time, not just VR! Super fun adventures and puzzles, controls are easy to use! Challenging in a really good way!

This was the best game I've played so far on oculus since I've had it for years. It wasn't too overwhelming for a casual game player. I screamed a few times from the snake, which was pretty funny. Can't wait to play the second one.
i fell to my death more times than id like to admit
This game is absolutely beautiful. This little character seems to be truly real and alive. The whole world around the player is made with so much love for detail. Thank you for this wonderful game!

What an awesome experience. I found myself playing in room scale mode so that I could just walk around and appreciate the landscape. I don’t know that I’ve ever communicated more with a character in a video game than I did in this one. I found myself actively talking to the character. Which is an a stretch because they look up and talk to you. Using sign language no less. Can’t recommend enough.
About 30 minutes into the game i gave up after the stupid water mill thing. No instructions on how to get the mouse off before he drowns.. Effing ridiculous
Love MOSS!!!!!!!!!!!!
Mechanics are super tight visuals are amazing story is emotionally satisfying this game made me feel like I was a kid again getting lost in fairy tale… must play
What a beautiful and cute game. That shows the potential of VR. I love, just to peek around the corner or over the wall. Simply beautiful.
Absolutely love this game. It's gorgeous graphics and adventure puzzle gameplay with a good story line is brilliant. Only downside, I finished it in only a few days! Now I need the others!!
One of my all time favourites, its just brilliant, i dont even know how to describe it. Play it :) you wont regret it
Just play it for yourself is amazing i love

Moss is a fun game, about as much fun as Moss 2, I enjoyed the one day it took me to beat it but that's the problem with this game, it's very short for the price tag.  You'd expect for a $20 game to last you a good while, at least a week of playtime, but that clearly isn't the case here.  Disappointed in my purchase due to the short play time, other than that it's a fantastic game.
A wonderful game to play.a little bit challenging but definitely worth a play. Will be playing the second one soon..

This is one of the best games I ever played. 
Atmospheric, great graphics, easy controls, just download and play this!

I don’t usually play games in this genre, but wow, I’m really glad I gave Moss a chance. It’s fantastic. The mechanics feel intuitive and satisfying, and the visuals are charming and immersive. The puzzles aren’t overly difficult, but they’re consistently fun and engaging.

What really stood out to me is how well the game balances being captivating while also relaxing. It showcases a different side of VR gaming that feels accessible and welcoming, especially for players concerned about motion sickness.

Safe to say, I’ll be jumping into Book II next.
Really loved how cute everything was! The story was great and easy to follow the puzzles were just the right amount of challenging!
Great adventure when you just want to chill. Super cute graphics and good performance.
Very super
I loved it 😍

reviews.review_title: Such a beautiful and cute game
reviews.review_description: A must buy for every VR owner
Will book 3 be released soon? ...please?!!
I liked the atmosphere, like in fairytale! Very well done and fun game!I recommend!
Perfect and Best game.... still waiting for Book 3

This was a very enjoyable game. I’m new to VR and did have to seek out tutorials now and again. Quill quickly became like a little buddy and I mourned her every one of the hundreds of times I lost her. I do appreciate that I was allowed to “skip combat” (not my favorite) and still complete the game. It would be nice if I could just choose that once at the beginning instead of stopping once I’m being attacked. Still, beautiful game and I’m looking forward to playing the next one (already purchased).

This is exactly what I was wanting! Just had knee surgery and have become some what addicted to VR, in the sense of just flat screen gaming doesn’t really do it any more!  This game is incredible, you truly feel immersed in the game’s environment, and story, absolutely Incredible!  Sure the more you play it you feel like there could be more elements to the game, but the developers deserve every penny they make off the game! Do yourself a favor and just get the bundle of Moss book 1&2 because as soon as you finish book 1 you’re ready to continue the story!

My only real suggestion for replay value would be a difficulty selection after completion maybe like an insane mode!

reviews.review_title: does not work with oculus quest 1
reviews.review_description: They should make an older version of the game available for download that works with the Quest 1 glasses. Owners of the newer glasses could then download the update separately.

The game starts, but I only see a black screen.  Can hear the sounds and if I press the A or B buttons, I can hear Moss jump and slash.   Please provide a fix!  This used to work fine when I had purchased it.

Update: Dropped another star for bad customer service.  Left a message on the maker's site polyarcgamesD0Tcom, but no one responded.  Seems we are SOL  :(
this is my first vr headset, and I've never played a game so awsome this little mouse got me hooked!!! I love it

Absolutely fantastic game, Stunning visuals.
And doesn't make me feel nauseous playing it.
I absolutely LOVE this game! I just got the meta quest & was hoping there was a game where it’s not really “virtual” but playing like a typical console.  Highly recommend!
